task_completion.description: The correct widget type and design theme are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Settings' step of widget creation with Type set to 'Catalog Products List' and Design Theme set to 'Magento Luma'.

task_completion.description: The widget title, store views, and sort order are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Storefront Properties' tab with Widget Title 'Homepage Featured Electronics', Assign to Store Views 'All Store Views', and Sort Order '10'.

task_completion.description: The layout update is configured to display the widget on the CMS Home Page in the Main Content Area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Layout Updates' section with 'Display On' targeting the CMS Home Page (e.g., Generic Pages -> CMS Home Page) and 'Container' set to 'Main Content Area'.

task_completion.description: The number of products to display is set to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Widget Options' tab with the 'Number of Products to Display' field set to '5'.

task_completion.description: A condition is added to filter products by the Electronics category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Widget Options' tab with a condition rule indicating that the Category is 'Electronics'.

task_completion.description: The widget is successfully saved in the Magento Admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a green success message (e.g., 'The widget instance has been saved.') or the 'Homepage Featured Electronics' widget listed in the Widgets grid.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin GUI to create the widget.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Magento Admin panel (Content > Widgets), not API clients or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of a terminal window executing magento CLI commands or SQL queries to insert the widget.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Magento Admin interface rendered in a standard web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct widget type is 'Catalog Products List' (Magento\CatalogWidget\Block\Product\ProductsList). The design theme is 'Magento Luma'. The layout handle for the CMS Home Page is 'cms_index_index' and the container for Main Content Area is 'content'. The target category for the condition is 'Electronics'.
